headline: Badland Banditos: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Badland Banditos carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 77.33, led by Ja'Marr Chase, Brock Bowers, and Kenneth Walker. The immediate preseason decision is not broad roster turnover; it is whether the FLEX slot currently occupied by Jayden Higgins (51.4 C-AVI) can be improved without weakening the verified core.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Ja'Marr Chase (99.6), Brock Bowers (99.0), and Kenneth Walker (87.5). That concentration gives Badland Banditos a defined top-end identity.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Among the eight verified championship-lineup slots, Jayden Higgins is the lowest C-AVI starter at 51.4. Any preseason acquisition should be measured against that exact lineup threshold, not against the bottom of the bench.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 12 offensive players, leaving 4 offensive players outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 75.23, which should be used to judge whether consolidation improves the lineup more than it reduces flexibility.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 12 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active. There is no knowledge-backed reason for an emergency replacement move this week.

sections.title: Draft Assets
sections.body: No franchise-labelled draft asset was found in the approved knowledge files. The summary does not infer ownership from roster position or prior conversations.
